programmes.show_description: The sound that started it all! Join us for a selection of legendary Clubland classics. Expect high-energy beats, the biggest vocal anthems and feel good party vibe for all!
25 songs from 25 years - all from the ladies! With Cheryl, Katy, Ellie, Tulisa and Cascada.
Fancy a mash up after midnight? Only massive, ad free anthems to help with your insomnia! More beats, less sleep!

Massive tunes and huge anthems. Each track a chart topping No.1 dance hit! This is the best of the best, these are the legends.

Need a fix of 90s club classics? Lock in for a marathon of memories as we take you back to the greatest decade of dance! The 90s!
Join Stephanie Hirst as she reveals Clubland's All Time 40! With iconic dancefloor legends, hands in the air anthems and infinitely catchy earworms. It's all here.

programmes.show_name: 35 Years Ago! Wow Feeling Old Yet?
programmes.show_description: 35 years in the making, these are the biggest tracks from 1991. Expect Rozalla, 2 Unlimited, C&C Music Factory and the KLF boys! Feeling old yet?
Everybody's free to feel good and Rozalla knows it! So let's join her as she takes us on a journey of her 40 favourite feel good anthems from back in the day.

programmes.show_name: Take Me To The Clouds Above!

Pianos delivered a euphoric feelgood factor to '90s house music! Here are 24 anthems, in order, from Black Box in 1990 to Paul Johnson in 1999. A decade of dance.

programmes.show_name: 15 Years Ago! Wow Feeling Old Yet?
programmes.show_description: 2011 gave us some awesome tracks including hits from Avicii, Guetta, Calvin Harris, Example and a load more! Were these all really 15 years ago?
Xenara has the ultimate Clubland Top 20 - the most streamed and watched by you! Who will be No.1? Agnes? Manian? Cascada?
